visual_summary: A massive, sun-drenched open plaza characterized by monumental scale and antiquity. The space features gold-trimmed architecture and marble surfaces, dominated by hundreds of ten-foot-tall Martian figures. The horizon is defined by the distant ruins of a dried sea bed, emphasizing a sense of vastness that dwarfs human proportions.
layout_notes: Massive stone paving; expansive open layout leading toward a distant dried sea bed horizon.
lighting: Expansive, sun-drenched scale with an open sky.
constraints: Scale must remain monumental to dwarf human proportions
Must maintain a sense of antiquity and vastness
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific architectural styles beyond "gold-trimmed" and "marble" are undefined.
Exact spatial relationship between the plaza and the dried sea bed ruins is not specified.
